body:
Friend, you need to be aware of this.

The People's Republic of China has been aggregating DNA and other healthcare records of Americans with the intent to exploit our citizens, our economy and our national security.

The National Counterintelligence and Security Center has released a statement warning Americans about China's legal and illegal practices to aggregate healthcare data with the sinister intent to exploit their enemies.

This is not a hypothetical, Friend. The PRC has already begun using genetic surveillance for the purposes of societal control of the Uyghurs population in Xinjiang, China.

We CANNOT let the PRC's actions continue to go unchecked. We need leaders who will stand up to the Chinese government and put an end to their illegal practices.

So far, the Biden Administration has ignored the MASSIVE threat China poses to our country. Instead, they've decided to focus our country's money and resources on an impeachment trial motivated by their own political vengeance. We can't let this continue.

name: Senate GOP
subject: Families need you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF JOHN BARRASSO
body:
Just two weeks in office and Joe Biden has abused his power, signing over 40 executive orders.

Just two weeks in office and Joe Biden has **abused his power** , signing over 40 executive orders.

From halting the Keystone XL Pipeline and stopping the construction of our border wall, Biden has proven he does not care about hard-working American families.

To put working families back in the forefront, we must win back the Senate. Schumer, Pelosi, and AOC are all too busy prioritizing the wrong things, while Americans across the country are struggling.

body:

So today, we wanted to reach out with two easy ways for you to help in this historically close race! **1\. Share the voters ' stories >> ** Voters who haven't had their ballots counted are speaking out, and we need your help to make sure they're heard. Can you share their stories on Facebook, Twitter, or over email with your friends and family? | ****[Share on Twitter>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/liqDm3eDnbU2KnQzZGcim0pFBb-SVhx5sSAFoh0TXvs=/cJXjOpAzsIQkD_2rjx77Jaj551B5f6H4s9i02YqMAaU=?s=20)****

**2\. Tell us why you 're in this fight >> **
Our team is working around the clock to get the word out to Iowans about what's at stake in this race, but we can't do it alone. _**If you 'd be willing to share your own thoughts with our larger community about why we need to count every vote in this race, please let us know at info@ritahart.com.**_
If neither of these ways work for you to help Rita today, that's okay! Thank you for supporting us however you can, whether it's by reading these emails, liking our posts on social media, or just rooting us on. We're so glad to have you with us, Peter!
-All of us at Rita Hart for Congress

name: True the Vote
subject: What's the Plan? | True the Vote Weekly Update | 2.06.21
body:
A weekly wrap up of all things election integrity.
| | | | [](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVlLXRoZS12b3RlLnJldnYuY28lMkZwZ19lX25ld3NsZXR0ZXJfNzIzMjAlM0Z1dG1fc291cmNlJTNEZW1haWxfUEclMjZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ24lM0R0dGYlMjZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtJTNERW1haWwlMjZ1dG1fY29udGVudCUzRFBHX25ld3NsZXR0ZXJfMDcyMzIw&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=367A861A20A3949)
---
| |
---
|
---
| | **What’s the Plan?**
---
| |
The question on everyone’s mind. What’s the plan? Who’s got the plan? When will the plan be revealed? I know of no grand plan. I wish I could tell you there was an assemblage of great leaders who are preparing a powerful, unified program, but I can’t.
Here’s what I can tell you - True the Vote is steadily getting after it. What are we specifically doing? We are doggedly and methodically working towards answering some of the questions around what happened in 2020. We are nearly finished with a web app and API that will provide broad access to data and research. We have been sued by and [are countersuing Stacy Abrams’ group](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZ0cnVlLXRoZS12b3RlLXN1ZXMtZmFpci1maWdodC1hY3Rpb24tb3Zlci1pbnRpbWlkYXRpb24tdGFjdGljcyUyRg==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=367A861A20A3966) Fair Fight Action in a battle over citizens’ rights to petition their government without fear of intimidation or abuse. We are scaling up across all fronts: new and better website, training, communications, support. And we would all like for this to happen more quickly, but it takes time. True the Vote is a small (but determined) lot.
While all of the above continues to come together, there are some core constructs that I encourage you to consider. Basic truths and to-dos that apply to us all. This is not the whole plan, but it is surely the beginning of one.
1\. **Stop pontificating** \- Your liberty is under broad assault; to speak freely, to assemble, to defend yourself, to a free and fair vote, to due process. Yes, it is really happening. Liberty is swaying like a punch-drunk boxer. Abandon your ringside seat and get in the ring.
2. Own it \- Quit waiting for a fast fix from someone else that will make everything better. There isn’t one. You are here now for a reason. We all are. We are the rebel alliance. We are the founders of our way forward. And we have to stick together.
3\. **Fear not** \- Fear is expressed in many forms; rage, silence, sorrow...they all come back to fear. Understand, that is what the opposition wants. They want you uncertain and afraid. Don’t fall for it. Freedom is written on your heart. Follow that. Be courageous and kind at the same time.
4\. **Get local, get granular** \- Election integrity rolls from bottom to top. Start at the bottom and true it all the way up.

* **Search online to find your county elections office**. You can find the information on the True the Vote website, too, but don’t do it that way...find the answer for yourself.
* **Call the office on Monday morning** and say _“I want to get involved in our local elections. Would you please connect me to whomever I can speak with about ways to volunteer?”_ Listen to what they say. If they give you options to serve, go for it. If they tell you to call a political party to volunteer, call one. Decide to engage and then do it. Every journey begins with a first step, this is yours.
* **Begin a new beginning.** If you’ve not been involved in elections before, moving forward you will be. That’s that. Choose in. If you’ve been involved for years, I still recommend making that call. Let it be symbolic of a fresh start from the ground up. I’m going to do it too. It will be a creation story we all share.

5\. **Pace yourself, but keep up the pace** \- There’s a lot of work to be done.

* Volunteering in local elections
* Organizing in a local election integrity team
* Learning your local and state election processes
* Supporting solid election reforms (and opposing bad ones)
* Helping keep your voter rolls clean
* Spreading the word, person to person
* Connecting teams by county and by state

You can look to True the Vote to help with much of this. We are working to broaden our platform, provide the resources you and your team will need in the days ahead. _But no one group can or should do this alone._[ There is power in collaboration.](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0aW1lLmNvbSUyRjU5MzYwMzYlMkZzZWNyZXQtMjAyMC1lbGVjdGlvbi1jYW1wYWlnbiUyRg==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=367A861A20A3977)
Do not wait on anything to get started, just get started. On Monday, make that call. Inch by inch, person by person, let’s work together smartly and steadily to connect across the entire country. If we do not do this now there may never be another chance.
**If you are already leading a county or state election integrity group or would like to add election integrity to your organization’s mission, we would love to work with you.**[**Please contact me here (and please be patient).**](mailto:catherine@truethevote.org)
No political consultants, party apologists, or patriot pretenders need apply. We’ve tried it your way. America bears unnecessary scars caused by your cowardice. We’ll take our chances without you.
It will be ‘we the people’ who preserve liberty for our children. Keep the faith.
Ever onward,

---
| | | |
---
| | |

Catherine Engelbrecht
Founder, True the Vote

PS. One more thing ... be joyful. We live in the greatest country in the world. Do not harden your heart. There is more power in love than in hate. So gird up, smile, and leave the haters behind.
---
| |
---
|
---
| | BE A PART OF IT
---
| | [Working Together For Accountability, Integrity, And Fairness](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZ2b2x1bnRlZXIlMkY=&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=367A861A20A3968)
There is still a great deal more yet to be done in the fight for the vote.

You can be a part of the process along with True the Vote. Just staying informed as citizen by receiving all our news and updates, you'll be helping to ensure the health of our system.

You can be an integral part of citizen-led efforts to ensure the integrity of your local ballot process. And with new apps and new ways to help right in your own backyard, you'll have phenomenal tools to get the job done right.

Don't wait. After all that's happened, after all the hardship of the last year, let's not waste one more minute just watching. Let's start doing something about it, together.
Sign up, Stay informed, and Volunteer with True the Vote!
---
| | [ VOLUNTEER ](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZ2b2x1bnRlZXIlMkY=&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=367A861A20A3968)

---

More than 30 million small businesses across the country are fighting to keep their doors open. Every day, they're faced with tough decisions and every moment is make or break.

Small businesses are the backbone of our economy and the lifeblood of our community. They create jobs, stimulate our community's economy, and provide opportunities for entrepreneurs. clean_body: Sign the petition to save small businesses. More than 30 million small businesses across the country are fighting to keep their doors open. Every day, they're faced with tough decisions and every moment is make or break. ** . == More than 30 million small businesses across the country are fighting to keep their doors open. Every day, they're faced with tough decisions and every moment is make or break. Small businesses are the backbone of our economy and the lifeblood of our community. They create jobs, stimulate our community's economy, and provide opportunities for entrepreneurs. But right now, they need our help. == == | ==** == If we do nothing, thousands more will close and thousands more Americans will lose their jobs. We can't let that happen. body:
10 years of Democratic control?
Friend, you've seen what the Biden Administration has done in just two short weeks to undo the conservative America First agenda. Just imagine what these RADICALS can do with 10 YEARS of control...
That's right. If we don't hold onto our Republican state legislatures, these out-of-touch Democrats will redraw your state's political maps to choose THEIR voters, instead of the other way around.
Redistricting only comes every 10 years. Don't let liberal billionaires like George Soros rig YOUR state to represent THEIR radical interests.
[**Can we count on you, Friend? _So much for unity. _

Days after Pelosi's call for unity, she's insulting conservative gun owners -- c**alling them enemies within...**
**[JOIN US-> STAND UP FOR 2A](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YNtRiFf3ocqHrjwQZZiQ4THulh1CEbHjopKUiR_Fn2sh5ShznQM2DVK6bzttejvFNGmRbQZti7abSlVf5ges_KJyKmpwOY9r5pdi0ipOxK3fO9XY5FmvudLtaUwUoiPAUuxz0OE2q3Ib_6poEo-WVafWF69CdBc166moewyjiJnk_arB5ZJKd7xqaYbb6zXe77Fie8NjLFIfns7LylqgrZsrmjMyZyoNvdaZg1sBpf2QtvyHcASlggoNZcbDwbyIx9zRUbQcSf9VDZ7PjpgOZOrVqk3d0gcfTnfIZyHkJLlzNjzJjT_p_EY5y487SF4dW5H_ohZHp_w8iox-PQt-tLD6--9U2dGHEydDwnZT7Nb_ux3bTK0KTu86V6A4EkO9WeHhnZTcW_AG6dfPO5jB7Piyq4aRJyvZ9RDdcShZadg=&c=nDTfNCzVtbwHKnztMglU5kipRVB5J74uygxWRuj0ghmeYVBYWaSWIg==&ch=f5NR4EYEsqGtdkv6r2ZJPnFnpsPAS6e7af--SW0sklF6oDcsjS7BUA==)**
Her hypocrisy is _DANGEROUS_ , Friend. And we need to make our position clear.
**[JOIN US-> STAND UP FOR 2A](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YNtRiFf3ocqHrjwQZZiQ4THulh1CEbHjopKUiR_Fn2sh5ShznQM2DVK6bzttejvFNGmRbQZti7abSlVf5ges_KJyKmpwOY9r5pdi0ipOxK3fO9XY5FmvudLtaUwUoiPAUuxz0OE2q3Ib_6poEo-WVafWF69CdBc166moewyjiJnk_arB5ZJKd7xqaYbb6zXe77Fie8NjLFIfns7LylqgrZsrmjMyZyoNvdaZg1sBpf2QtvyHcASlggoNZcbDwbyIx9zRUbQcSf9VDZ7PjpgOZOrVqk3d0gcfTnfIZyHkJLlzNjzJjT_p_EY5y487SF4dW5H_ohZHp_w8iox-PQt-tLD6--9U2dGHEydDwnZT7Nb_ux3bTK0KTu86V6A4EkO9WeHhnZTcW_AG6dfPO5jB7Piyq4aRJyvZ9RDdcShZadg=&c=nDTfNCzVtbwHKnztMglU5kipRVB5J74uygxWRuj0ghmeYVBYWaSWIg==&ch=f5NR4EYEsqGtdkv6r2ZJPnFnpsPAS6e7af--SW0sklF6oDcsjS7BUA==)**
I have said it time and time again, I will **ALWAYS** put action over rhetoric -- and when it comes to DEFENDING our 2nd Amendment rights, I have the record to prove it.
**[JOIN US-> STAND UP FOR 2A](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YNtRiFf3ocqHrjwQZZiQ4THulh1CEbHjopKUiR_Fn2sh5ShznQM2DVK6bzttejvFNGmRbQZti7abSlVf5ges_KJyKmpwOY9r5pdi0ipOxK3fO9XY5FmvudLtaUwUoiPAUuxz0OE2q3Ib_6poEo-WVafWF69CdBc166moewyjiJnk_arB5ZJKd7xqaYbb6zXe77Fie8NjLFIfns7LylqgrZsrmjMyZyoNvdaZg1sBpf2QtvyHcASlggoNZcbDwbyIx9zRUbQcSf9VDZ7PjpgOZOrVqk3d0gcfTnfIZyHkJLlzNjzJjT_p_EY5y487SF4dW5H_ohZHp_w8iox-PQt-tLD6--9U2dGHEydDwnZT7Nb_ux3bTK0KTu86V6A4EkO9WeHhnZTcW_AG6dfPO5jB7Piyq4aRJyvZ9RDdcShZadg=&c=nDTfNCzVtbwHKnztMglU5kipRVB5J74uygxWRuj0ghmeYVBYWaSWIg==&ch=f5NR4EYEsqGtdkv6r2ZJPnFnpsPAS6e7af--SW0sklF6oDcsjS7BUA==)**
_**In fact, I'm leading 16 other Attorneys General in the fight to protect the NRA. **_

But our mission to protect the NRA isn't just in the courtroom, Friend. We need a grassroots organization to compete against Pelosi and the far-left's plans for lawful gun owners.

**[Can I count on you to join us?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YNtRiFf3ocqHrjwQZZiQ4THulh1CEbHjopKUiR_Fn2sh5ShznQM2DVK6bzttejvFNGmRbQZti7abSlVf5ges_KJyKmpwOY9r5pdi0ipOxK3fO9XY5FmvudLtaUwUoiPAUuxz0OE2q3Ib_6poEo-WVafWF69CdBc166moewyjiJnk_arB5ZJKd7xqaYbb6zXe77Fie8NjLFIfns7LylqgrZsrmjMyZyoNvdaZg1sBpf2QtvyHcASlggoNZcbDwbyIx9zRUbQcSf9VDZ7PjpgOZOrVqk3d0gcfTnfIZyHkJLlzNjzJjT_p_EY5y487SF4dW5H_ohZHp_w8iox-PQt-tLD6--9U2dGHEydDwnZT7Nb_ux3bTK0KTu86V6A4EkO9WeHhnZTcW_AG6dfPO5jB7Piyq4aRJyvZ9RDdcShZadg=&c=nDTfNCzVtbwHKnztMglU5kipRVB5J74uygxWRuj0ghmeYVBYWaSWIg==&ch=f5NR4EYEsqGtdkv6r2ZJPnFnpsPAS6e7af--SW0sklF6oDcsjS7BUA==)**

Leslie Rutledge

body:
We're giving away a signed football tomorrow night. You want in? | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/1b21653ed4a3/ag-morriseys-saturday-update-and-super-bowl-prediction?e=24057c0240)

# Saturday Update and Super Bowl Prediction!
Dear Peter,We hope you are having a wonderful Saturday.Attorney General Patrick Morrisey has been working nonstop to advance conservative values, attack West Virginia’s Opioid Epidemic, and defend his constituents from Joe Biden’s executive overreach.On Thursday, his Office announced a $10 million settlement agreement against McKinsey & Company Inc. for creating programs and marketing systems which contributed to the Opioid Epidemic.And according to WV News, “...no portion of the $10 million settlement will be diverted to reimburse outside law firms. That provides a substantial savings for state taxpayers and helps ensure proceeds fund the agreement’s intended purpose — remediation of the drug abuse crisis in West Virginia.”Hear the full update by watching the video below:
[](https://patrickmorrisey.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c58654388ec83b4612750ef7&id=4a8e20a237&e=24057c0240)
Tomorrow, we will also watch an incredible Super Bowl between the Kansas City Chiefs and the Tampa Bay Buccaneers.See Morrisey’s prediction in the attached video.Do you think his prediction is correct?Show us who you think will prevail in tomorrow’s Super Bowl game.Chip in $5 to support your prediction and help Patrick Defend America.
| [$5 for the Chiefs!](https://patrickmorrisey.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c58654388ec83b4612750ef7&id=d81eb02750&e=24057c0240)
---
| [$5 for the Buccaneers!](https://patrickmorrisey.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c58654388ec83b4612750ef7&id=c2184cfcb2&e=24057c0240)
---
If you can predict the winner, you’ll have a chance to get a signed football by AG Patrick Morrisey. We will be giving that football away this week!
* Please contribute by 6:30 PM EST tomorrow.

Sincerely,Team Morrisey
|

name: Ro Khanna
subject: One month since the insurrection
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
There is no room for hatred and deliberate misinformation in the halls of Congress. Please, if you can, make a donation today to show that you support hearings to expel Marjorie Taylor Greene from Congress.
#
One month ago, we experienced one of the darkest days in American history.
I will not make you relive the utter terror and violence our nation watched unfold as alt-right insurrectionists stormed our Capitol building. Instead, it’s important that we acknowledge that, one month later, _there has still been zero accountability for the bad actors who supported and encouraged this attack._
**That’s why I called for hearings to expel Congresswoman Marjorie Taylor Greene, who repeatedly called for violence, from the House of Representatives.**
**[There is no room for hatred and deliberate misinformation in the halls of Congress. Please, if you can, make a donation today to show that I have your support in calling for hearings to expel Marjorie Taylor Greene from Congress.](https://act.rokhanna.com/go/5211?refcode=ema-1624&t=20&akid=1624%2E946728%2E5Y7xjJ)**
**[Contribute](https://act.rokhanna.com/go/5211?refcode=em-1624&amounts=&t=21&akid=1624%2E946728%2E5Y7xjJ)**
Rep. Greene has shared racist, xenophobia, and harmful disinformation on social media and the House floor. Despite the violence we saw one month ago, she has still refused to apologize or take back her harmful rhetoric. This type of behavior and these hateful beliefs should not be tolerated in the U.S. House of Representatives – a body of Congress which I am very proud to serve in.
A few days ago, I joined my House colleagues in voting to strip Rep. Greene from her committee assignments. But quite frankly, **that’s not enough.**
**I will always take on the responsibility of doing what’s right to protect our democracy and make our country work for _all_ of us. [Donate today to show your support for my work in Congress, like calling for hearings to expel Marjorie Taylor Greene from Congress.](https://act.rokhanna.com/go/5211?refcode=ema-1624&t=22&akid=1624%2E946728%2E5Y7xjJ)**
Thank you for your support,
Ro Khanna

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ro-khanna?refcode=emfooter20210206&t=23&refcode2=1624_946728_5Y7xjJ&akid=1624%2E946728%2E5Y7xjJ)** | [](https://www.facebook.com/RoKhannaUSA) | [](https://twitter.com/RoKhanna)
---|---|---
Paid for by Ro for Congress
PO Box 3513, Santa Clara, CA 95051
Email us: [info@rokhanna.com](mailto:info@rokhanna.com)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we stay in touch with you, but if you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.rokhanna.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=1624%2E946728%2E5Y7xjJ).

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: Equity, Inclusion, and Opportunity for all Hoosiers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Hoosiers have ALWAYS stepped up to confront the toughest challenges facing our nation, and leading the way towards greater opportunity for all Hoosier | |
---
| [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=b42e655fc0dc418c93520928ae318d3f&_e=xbrdWtBb1xMnBgv2QzWqjVex75NVOv9vWOUN8kOGyNoyDcDw9YJpWzxKVYOHh6-b95Zro5GRero3lEJqegKIgL7wJ8Dm1AZL_vUnrrRFS6Qgv_Pdobt2_IbwmF11dPhaXVoE8ziAPqmWGRwp7iyDVY51KjPVzb19_wM9P6GUzSyphlahd8-jAGNYrCKXTZxvuRoqBKd3eGecQWbPzI9oq0Lq8uKy__T3e4qs7udUTRc-0VpgjJs0EZnCNWtiG_tIVw0xEq7PD-U21lR9JRGijqmX_-z3rKYu1d5w4yHDylMMwJ_IKqCewGJoHaPId_Gzy7P3t638KVZiIO_FgMrLHHLTrMJTjRYnoSsUhrUH9CNI3I6LBCKO2ivHYkId8JyjDPYTmDrt3g5I2oRoFOUhhHvsXEqXsb9okCQBhVA5dIjHJ2Mo7v7n4F_psrCUiO7wOLXe0yJV-ZVPu3hs5KyqVLQne_GRea0w4tPcgBCHMguJ_KehdS4ijvkKTJOCTuGs) |
---|---|---
|
---
Friend,

**It’s Black History Month, and that means we’re celebrating the accomplishments, achievements, and triumphs of the Black Hoosiers who have left an indelible impact on our state. **

But for Hoosiers across Indiana, it’s also a time to reflect on the events of the last year and remind ourselves that there’s still opportunities for us to keep working together to form that more perfect union.

Hoosiers have _ALWAYS_ stepped up to confront the toughest challenges facing our nation, and leading the way towards greater opportunity for all Hoosiers is no different.

As we continue our celebration of Black History Month, Governor Holcomb is reaffirming his commitment to building One Indiana for All.
[](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=b42e655fc0dc418c93520928ae318d3f&_e=xbrdWtBb1xMnBgv2QzWqjVex75NVOv9vWOUN8kOGyNoyDcDw9YJpWzxKVYOHh6-b95Zro5GRero3lEJqegKIgL7wJ8Dm1AZL_vUnrrRFS6Qgv_Pdobt2_IbwmF11dPhaXVoE8ziAPqmWGRwp7iyDVY51KjPVzb19_wM9P6GUzSyphlahd8-jAGNYrCKXTZxvuRoqBKd3eGecQWbPzI9oq0Lq8uKy__T3e4qs7udUTRc-0VpgjJs0EZnCNWtiG_tIVw0xEq7PD-U21lR9JRGijqmX_-z3rKYu1d5w4yHDylMjDShqbOb549h1YSVThhOwj1UWCzFrZ7nkgjKI4QJbJkx70o5M9m0i2ZWVZ7O4BQe85DghGZfCDaJ9ULM07q1n1MsMmyA_pX-GqSx5GSsUXKrO1IpUlXA9MIZN6bK1x-mrZRwnqtM3TgfUvUAyljzTzDTja290cSV-4S-i000l5T7TilJs1cngvhROKF5UqhAkN67cpbOdxkmKbY0btyb5)
[**WATCH AND SHARE**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=b42e655fc0dc418c93520928ae318d3f&_e=xbrdWtBb1xMnBgv2QzWqjVex75NVOv9vWOUN8kOGyNoyDcDw9YJpWzxKVYOHh6-b95Zro5GRero3lEJqegKIgL7wJ8Dm1AZL_vUnrrRFS6Qgv_Pdobt2_IbwmF11dPhaXVoE8ziAPqmWGRwp7iyDVY51KjPVzb19_wM9P6GUzSyphlahd8-jAGNYrCKXTZxvuRoqBKd3eGecQWbPzI9oq0Lq8uKy__T3e4qs7udUTRc-0VpgjJs0EZnCNWtiG_tIVw0xEq7PD-U21lR9JRGijqmX_-z3rKYu1d5w4yHDylPZC09F9PFwYLxEzmZxy0R8HOKkqc0FEkoDL5Hz9ZSh5kxevI3vhzF4vsgwjtql6cXItWdYXuhWvSyfBV78_F0gQSZKiMZWTcQHrfiDUbqKPraweklDv4n9_wR_CLzm8XfSlVB6L-jX7-i1GekBQhLiwgsBAz8t81e2xSDLPA2oJVLVHuVnpocjSDtyiz-k5K7v5-6bX02_U178sBbTiU53)
_Governor Holcomb outlined a set of bold actions that his administration would take to level the playing field for Hoosiers in his speech last August. Here’s what those steps included:_

**1\. The Creation of a Chief Equity, Inclusion and Opportunity Officer**

Indiana’s first Chief Equity, Inclusion and Opportunity Officer Karrah A. Herring is working overtime to deliver results for marginalized communities in Indiana.

Working with Governor Holcomb’s administration, she is already building bridges for marginalized Hoosiers to have better access and participate in all the functions of our state government.

**2\. Aggressively closing gaps in the classroom and in the workplace**

We’re dedicated to closing racial achievement gaps and that starts with recruiting strong minority teacher talent to our classrooms and investing in those teachers and school districts who will work to skill-up our workforce of tomorrow.

Governor Holcomb’s “Next Level Jobs Program” is currently recruiting thousands of minority candidates to give them a jump-start on their careers while helping to fill good-paying, skilled job openings across the state.

You can start your own career journey today by visiting [nextleveljobs.org](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=b42e655fc0dc418c93520928ae318d3f&_e=xbrdWtBb1xMnBgv2QzWqjY6GMODqzdWBf1mbd1sCcGA0NXZqCWWnr7gazU2t3x2j58dKk-vNVSe6cEfaKW7YdIumMMOOjae6osqpOMEfkvyowGl_UMhgJPd64gysD9gAfdoj1ES1X7xprPQZSXEwOA1Suv6kVUljaUm8p83Ls2J8bi7LLeXgyovIODYsPPycKvzOSSCkuvN_fowbSp2V0Tut32RakOUg6xMQ-2AIxUNEc-h7HdhAzvw8Qw64cc6XL5hfoWHLb-iTu7JeJO3sYB3w_VJotAzWEalTKOtzCZTkXadc7vltme2lm5oFn9AL9uXxyjRsIHe8h9zbeYLgh3QkdfVmnKLnSJLh_hgzlwuhjHuRpeGN7pky4z1LWPX8aI1yBZIKd82foo1tZLNISqwn8OQbA9J_v1Zp44MI4GAkdhYSQ4M9cac_g4GICBwq).

**3\. Reforming Hoosier Police Training and Practices**

Governor Holcomb knows that we must do a better job at protecting and serving ALL Hoosiers. This spring, every front-line Indiana state trooper will be outfitted with a body camera.
**[WATCH AND SHARE: Equality, Equity, and Opportunity for ALL Hoosiers](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=b42e655fc0dc418c93520928ae318d3f&_e=xbrdWtBb1xMnBgv2QzWqjVex75NVOv9vWOUN8kOGyNoyDcDw9YJpWzxKVYOHh6-b95Zro5GRero3lEJqegKIgL7wJ8Dm1AZL_vUnrrRFS6Qgv_Pdobt2_IbwmF11dPhaXVoE8ziAPqmWGRwp7iyDVY51KjPVzb19_wM9P6GUzSyphlahd8-jAGNYrCKXTZxvuRoqBKd3eGecQWbPzI9oq0Lq8uKy__T3e4qs7udUTRc-0VpgjJs0EZnCNWtiG_tIVw0xEq7PD-U21lR9JRGijqmX_-z3rKYu1d5w4yHDylO6bW-V4gT8H7NzDV9p7clwYMsc0LAzth-E-V7feo3DGiJTyKoFcmErM5wM9FsGAaZ-ibZ_lOCZ5ggZNr-N0FSKdKsBstHArZ0QhYXkTHTNTvhAUjKTv25TYYluVmWcVEPIDgNicuYXpJkoJ9Jw8BQ9ZsUasfBqDJWPPrxbUSGey1NNQ6c98rktwcyWSlqJVdX2c1OzvZO-AQ9BTTYc3z8p)**

Friend, it’s going to take all of us working together to achieve the goals outlined by the governor and to truly create One Indiana for All.

They won’t be achieved overnight, but with your help, we can continue to make Indiana a more equal and equitable place for all Hoosiers to live, learn, and work, one day at a time.
Thank you,

\- Holcomb Crew

Derek, Next week, the Senate will begin Donald Trump’s _second_ impeachment trial. Republicans in the Senate are showing a new level of political cravenness and have given every indication that they will not convict Trump on the charge of inciting an insurrection. **Folks, just because Senate Republicans value their careers over the Constitution doesn’t mean we give up the fight.[Join me in calling on Senate Republicans to do their job and convict Donald Trump.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnk56bMqj-Q2REUloTmiNQwzQ8fH6G1G0kE4trPooCoOO3AGVBTpC9rvuQo0FK32NYgcapI3G0gxW14d_qpNWVgC5jB7D_np6cBo6iFgKpjuIIDVynz-XHJsGmb_jYAw7aN8d3OE_QDqyOA7_vZKCDIfTbiiDH2EwwnAJUbugdG_NK2Ol3sXNZPaLtFxYVi49yDXU4nvk0enqo_tIer2gp7I6iIWQaVZOTD2XwkdrpIVbKHwtBucGmIWNEuUCFYo_lLVEClteb-mCfN2DYQ9WqRuLo2OvPO3uwNvjA8VWTantotF24OXDluBGtZJ1Meja1HReeyvyhTG70hHfC44UKHABBWBUy52BKVDu05uhrEpISRcmWHfPY4zn5FL3JDnKc_m1oM5-g5lFPl3HT7X8GcX/397/Gkd5xVlOTuiL1UznJ_06pA/h1/izu5MrbNs6LtFi-HaHCHQRbvQcCVCBK3NPNaagjnFK4)** | [**ADD MY NAME**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnk56bMqj-Q2REUloTmiNQwzQ8fH6G1G0kE4trPooCoOO3AGVBTpC9rvuQo0FK32NYgcapI3G0gxW14d_qpNWVgC5jB7D_np6cBo6iFgKpjuIIDVynz-XHJsGmb_jYAw7aN8d3OE_QDqyOA7_vZKCDIfTbiiDH2EwwnAJUbugdG_NDa9zPNMNoIibTxon4Th892Y2wugxSjMEtVyhZOQT1j0335Vp6UMqP6vYKqohOOmgamoEQJ40jVFLtVkTvZyMbcKxzQEe9dw3xZ8xIhRFUHAq8yXj88tR_G6S3iVe0O8-cLpi0_IOhYEEvQqb4Wyl-uWwmRBKfYvsu-7gfu7iIBLWl51eFjYquWzmVGeRUHUPYGyWcyrux14OVDOOrdIcWZLxqlajSuS_O_CTdEgQt9h/397/Gkd5xVlOTuiL1UznJ_06pA/h2/s1Pp6eBp-pXSmqSQFcixGZLH-XVJoiPe86uKpahODrQ)
---
This isn’t just some Washington, D.C. issue that doesn’t touch our Commonwealth.
Between Amanda Chase (who calls herself “Trump in heels”) and Kirk Cox (who refused to acknowledge the results of a free and fair election for weeks), we have a vested interest in ensuring Donald Trump is held responsible for his actions.
Thank you for reading and I hope you’ll join me in signing the petition.
\-- Terry

Peter,

The Editor of Forbes Magazine has gone after me and the rest of President Trump's former staff demanding we be shunned from the public eye. They don't like me, my policies, or who I worked for... so they think everything is fair game in their war against me.

**[FIGHT BACK>>](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=d93126eddbcb4701b181e55d2e2f9038&_e=JrieC4YMme7qB2zdiMkCKuKPm0icaB_wGJ2JtGEt--s-6waRnkVIB-KfITrEB5yeU5MSH1qUOEmuMWatrkEUa8vIZBgtXkdUFSYPu7ri76bun938jANrSnet7WFHw4rIRCqLS7xTnpoNBEcq0UddvQ8Hs6r6Xb_PjotPujVNGqoFcvTer6OBvC-a4azptS-W8d5c_pLoY_dtzq5OMTc9BaFgm4cq-L8NykgnQNcgfztk5cZ8J_4a3hi0SV0AcYJkD2iSOVNVMzo_EM2Jq4uL_HIRB6gH-oonODCrAuofzloxzM2vSfWwZTnIYKJhEHtWT2N7vF5QW331cb9HE1_6ao4AG52VMZasbk_4-eqFWeRlSocftSfYY8yRzuO1Paou1oqcJqoSTCJ5_O-WTUlQLXsh1IpaM4xD93-uwRmMKJVH_a0bhMNLoNCoDr6QbDCsOMgMJRD107M4oniLlEl0hQ%3D%3D)**

But let me tell you, Peter, I will not be backed into a corner or silenced by the radical left.

**I know who I am. I know what I stand for. And I don’t back down. **

That's why I'm running for Governor, and I want you to join me today to help fight back against this “cancel culture” that wants conservatives like YOU and me silenced forever!

Arkansas law limits contributions to $5,600 per election cycle. Each individual, political party committee, legislative caucus committee or approved political action committee may contribute up to $2,800 for the primary election and $2,800 for the general election -- for a total of $5,600.
Corporate contributions are not permissible.
Contributions are not tax deductible for Federal income tax purposes. Individuals may take a tax credit on Arkansas tax returns, up to a total of $50 per individual for political contributions made each year.
Contributions from foreign nationals are prohibited by law.
State law requires that we collect and report name, address, employer and occupation for each contributor.
